sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'foo bar'), (3, 'test case');
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'updated text' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, multiMatchAnyIndex(text, ['hello', 'foo', 'test']) AS matched_index FROM test_strings;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE multiMatchAnyIndex(text, ['not', 'matched', 'pattern']) > 0;
